top_issues: Fixed 264px sidebar without documented mobile reflow risks unusable main column below ~768px.
Steady-state-only inventory omits empty, loading, and error recovery for the task list.
Primary CTA vs filter cluster reading order is unspecified for narrow widths.
summary.risk_statement: Without breakpoint-specific layout rules and non-happy-path states, the MVP dashboard cannot meet the brief’s responsive and QA-ready acceptance bar: users may be unable to complete core task actions on small viewports and will hit dead ends when lists are empty or requests fail.

findings.title: Banner title tier competes with main page title tier
findings.evidence: shell-app-header maps to type-title-capable roles (type-display optional) while surface-main-column page_header also maps to type-title in ui-normalized §3 table; both sit above the fold with no stated single H1 owner.
findings.impact: Users get two same-weight orientation anchors and a broken scan path before reaching task rows.
findings.recommendation: Declare one dominant page title per viewport: demote shell product label to type-label or reserve type-title exclusively for the main column header.

findings.title: Primary CTA ordering relative to filters is undefined
findings.evidence: ui-normalized lists CTA primária and Filtros/chips as separate regions without a toolbar reading order tying button-primary to chip-filter above/below or left/right across breakpoints.
findings.impact: Implementations can place the primary action after a wide chip cluster, burying the core create-task path on narrow layouts.
findings.recommendation: Specify a single focal path in the toolbar: keep button-primary first in DOM/visual order before filter chips on mobile, with sticky placement if the filter row grows.

findings.title: Fixed 264px sidebar collides with mobile gutters without reflow
findings.evidence: nav-sidebar layout_rules.width_px is 264 while architecture requires responsive behavior; at 320px width, 264px rail leaves ~56px before surface-main-column padding space-6 (32px) totals, violating practical content min-widths for card-task-row min_height_px 72.
findings.impact: Mis-taps, clipped labels, and illegible meta lines on small phones block the dashboard task on mobile-class viewports.
findings.recommendation: Document collapse to icon rail, drawer, or bottom nav under a breakpoint with a measured minimum main-column width token and transition behavior.

findings.title: Horizontal rhythm inside task rows vs chips is inconsistent
findings.evidence: card-task-row layout_rules.gap is space-3 (12px) across anatomy slots while chip-filter uses space-3 horizontal padding with space-1 vertical padding; nav-sidebar uses gap_items space-2 (8px) vertical stack.
findings.impact: Related metadata can appear optically closer to neighboring rows than to its own title block during fast scanning.
findings.recommendation: Introduce a fixed meta column or 12-column subgrid inside card-task-row so status, title, and meta share one horizontal rhythm distinct from filter chips.

findings.title: Empty, loading, and error paths are absent from the component model
findings.evidence: design_system.json components array lists shell, nav, main, card, button, chip, badge only; ui-normalized §2 enumerates steady-state regions without skeletons, empty lists, or fetch failure panels.
findings.impact: Users encounter dead ends without recovery affordances; QA cannot assert console/network-clean flows against explicit acceptance for non-happy paths per testing-and-qa standards expectations for shipped capabilities.
findings.recommendation: Add P0 organisms for list-loading skeleton, zero-task empty state, and recoverable error with retry aligned to tokenized spacing and the main landmark.

findings.title: Active chip state relies mainly on hue flip
findings.evidence: chip-filter tokens set active_fg and neutral_fg both to fg-default on active_bg accent-primary vs neutral_bg bg-subtle; only background hue differentiates pressed state.
findings.impact: Color-only differentiation weakens pressed clarity for users who distinguish state poorly.
findings.recommendation: Pair active chips with a leading check icon, weight shift on type-label, or visible border token so pressed state is not hue-alone.

findings.title: Supporting stats panels lack a canonical component mapping
findings.evidence: ui-exploration.md §1 lists supporting panels (stats, filters) but design_system.json has no stats/kpi organism and ui-normalized §2 omits a stats region while filters are specified.
findings.impact: Frontend drift: ad-hoc spacing and typography outside the token table, breaking atomic-design single-responsibility boundaries in the brief.
findings.recommendation: Add a named organism (for example kpi-strip or stats-panel) with anatomy, layout_rules, and type roles so supporting panels serialize like other dashboard regions.
